name: query-edr-bypass
bodyMarkdown:
# EDR Bypass Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1562.001, T1562.006 | **Log Sources:** Sysmon EID 6, EID 10, WEL 7036/7040

```kql
DeviceEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "DriverLoaded"
| where AdditionalFields !contains "Microsoft"
| extend LoadedBy = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).LoadedImage)
| where LoadedBy !in ("csrss.exe", "svchost.exe", "lsass.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, LoadedBy, FileName=tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).FileName), SHA256=tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).SHA256)
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
